agents.stance: Prioritizes open civic access with targeted safeguards.
Prioritizes institutional stability and risk controls.

screening.reason: Static local-LM priors differ on topic-relevant access-versus-security values.

topic: public release of dual-use policy datasets

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text:
My view has not changed.
Strongest opponent point: Releasing dual-use policy datasets could compromise national security by providing sensitive information to potential adversaries.
Counterargument: The benefits of transparency and accountability outweigh the risks. Proper redaction and declassification procedures can mitigate security concerns while promoting trust and informed public discourse.
View change: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: Risiko keamanan nasional bisa meningkat karena rilis data yang dapat digunakan oleh pihak-pihak negatif.
Counterargument saya: Manfaat transparansi dan akuntabilitas melebihi risiko tersebut. Melalui prosedur penghapusan dan dekripsi yang tepat, ancaman keamanan dapat diminimalkan sambil mendorong kepercayaan dan diskusi publik yang berinformasi.
Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text:
Strongest opponent point: Releasing dual-use policy datasets could compromise national security by providing sensitive information to potential adversaries.
Counterargument: The benefits of transparency and accountability outweigh the risks. Proper redaction and declassification procedures can mitigate security concerns while promoting trust and informed public discourse.
View change: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: Risiko keamanan nasional bisa meningkat karena rilis data yang dapat digunakan oleh pihak-pihak negatif.
Counterargument saya: Selain prosedur penghapusan dan dekripsi, kita juga dapat melibatkan ahli keamanan nasional untuk memeriksa dan memvalidasi data sebelum rilis, sehingga risiko dapat dijauhkan sepenuhnya.
Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.
